message:
fix(schema): preserve original DDL SQL in sqlite_master instead of regenerating with quoted identifiers

SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master now returns the CREATE TABLE/INDEX/VIEW text
as written by the user, matching C SQLite behavior. Previously, the SQL was
regenerated from the in-memory schema with all identifiers double-quoted
(e.g. "users" instead of users).

Added original_ddl_sql cache on Connection, populated by insert_sqlite_master_row,
used by build_sqlite_master_rows, included in DbSnapshot for rollback safety.

Also added 8 new conformance oracle tests: compound SELECT ordering, UPSERT
conflict handling, datetime functions, schema introspection, complex GROUP BY,
UPDATE/DELETE with subqueries, multi-table JOINs, and expression evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
